Name: UInterpToMovementComponent
Description:
Move the root component between a series of points over a given time  
 
  @see UMovementComponent

Variables.Name: Duration
Variables.Description: How long to take to move from the first point to the last (or vice versa)

Variables.Name: bPauseOnImpact
Variables.Description: If true, will pause movement on impact. If false it will behave as if the end of the movement range was reached based on the BehaviourType.

Variables.Name: bForceSubStepping
Variables.Description:
If true, forces sub-stepping to break up movement into discrete smaller steps to improve accuracy of the trajectory.
	  Objects that move in a straight line typically do not need to set this, as movement always uses continuous collision detection (sweeps) so collision is not missed.
	  Sub-stepping is automatically enabled when under the effects of gravity or when homing towards a target.
	  @see MaxSimulationTimeStep, MaxSimulationIterations

Variables.Name: MaxSimulationTimeStep
Variables.Description:
Max time delta for each discrete simulation step.
	  Lowering this value can address issues with fast-moving objects or complex collision scenarios, at the cost of performance.
	 
	  WARNING: if (MaxSimulationTimeStep  MaxSimulationIterations) is too low for the min framerate, the last simulation step may exceed MaxSimulationTimeStep to complete the simulation.
	  @see MaxSimulationIterations, bForceSubStepping

Variables.Name: MaxSimulationIterations
Variables.Description:
Max number of iterations used for each discrete simulation step.
	  Increasing this value can address issues with fast-moving objects or complex collision scenarios, at the cost of performance.
	 
	  WARNING: if (MaxSimulationTimeStep  MaxSimulationIterations) is too low for the min framerate, the last simulation step may exceed MaxSimulationTimeStep to complete the simulation.
	  @see MaxSimulationTimeStep, bForceSubStepping

Variables.Name: ControlPoints
Variables.Description: List of control points to visit.

Functions.Name: StopSimulating
Functions.Description: Clears the reference to UpdatedComponent, fires stop event, and stops ticking.

Functions.Name: RestartMovement
Functions.Description: Reset to start. Sets time to zero and direction to 1.

Functions.Name: FinaliseControlPoints
Functions.Description: Initialise the control points array. Call after adding control points if they are add after begin play .

Delegate.Name: OnInterpToReverse
Delegate.Description: Called when InterpTo impacts something and reverse is enabled.

Delegate.Name: OnInterpToStop
Delegate.Description: Called when InterpTo has come to a stop.

Delegate.Name: OnWaitBeginDelegate
Delegate.Description: Called when InterpTo has come to a stop but will resume when possible.

Delegate.Name: OnWaitEndDelegate
Delegate.Description: Called when InterpTo has resumed following a stop.

Delegate.Name: OnResetDelegate
Delegate.Description: Called when InterpTo reached the end and reset back to start .
